ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled   4  5  4  4  Balanced approach, maintaining fairness while accommodating urgency; persona and context well-matched.
baseline_no_context             3  4  3  3  Contextually relevant but lacks personal touch in the response to urgency; natural dialogue style is present.

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as an Old Merchant who values fairness and quality but also shows flexibility in urgent situations; the language used feels natural for a trader speaking to another traveler. The overall quality of this interaction seems high given these factors.
